Our Story

Rooted in Bangladesh's Rich Heritage

DeshiSpices BD was born from a simple belief — every Bangladeshi kitchen deserves the real thing. We travel to the source, from the forests of Khulna to the highlands of Sylhet, to bring you spices in their most authentic form.

Every batch is personally selected, hygienically processed, and sealed under our brand — so what reaches your kitchen is exactly what grows in the heart of Bangladesh.

Direct from OriginSylhet, Khulna & other regional farms
Hygienic ProcessingSealed, clean & quality-tested every time
A-Grade CertifiedOnly the finest grade makes it to your home
Explore Products
Our Collection

Premium Spice Selection

Star Product

Khulna's Legendary Chui Jhal

Chui Jhal (Piper chaba) is a rare root spice found only in the Khulna region of Bangladesh. Its warm, earthy heat is unlike any chili — it seeps deep into meat and transforms beef or mutton into something unforgettable.

Khulna, Bangladesh
Root Spice (Piper chaba)
Beef, Mutton, Duck
A-Quality
৳490
Whole / Ground

Why DeshiSpices BD

The Difference You Can Taste

Direct Sourcing
We travel to farms in Sylhet, Khulna, and beyond — no middlemen, no compromises.
A-Grade Only
Every lot is inspected. Only the finest grade is packed under the DeshiSpices BD label.
Hygienically Packed
Sealed under clean conditions. No artificial colors, no fillers, no shortcuts.
All Bangladesh Delivery
We deliver to all 64 districts. Cash on delivery available everywhere.
Wholesale Available
Special pricing for shops and restaurants. Become a reseller today.
